scenes.prompt: Cinematic close-up, grand piano, warm sunset light. Antonia (11y, teal belt) plays deep bass notes, soundwaves ripple in indigo. Estela (8y, gold belt) plays high notes, light filaments sparkle. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 4K, 35mm lens.
scenes.audio_prompt: Deep cinematic piano + bright arpeggios, building tension.

scenes.prompt: High-octane martial arts choreography. Antonia uses soundwaves to push enemies back. Estela creates light bridges to run on walls. Dynamic camera angles, slow-motion impacts, neon trails. Cyberpunk dojo background.
scenes.audio_prompt: Epic orchestral beats sync with martial arts impacts.

scenes.prompt: Ultimate Combo Move. Antonia screams, soundwave amplifies Estela's light beam. A massive prism of energy traps the villain. Explosion of colors (Indigo + Gold).
Peaceful resolution. The sisters sit back at the piano, exhausted but smiling. They play a final C-Major chord. Fade to black with logo 'Musical Martial Arts'.
scenes.audio_prompt: Soft piano coda, triumphant but gentle.
